{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322052052544C4C72C3C4E5F2D3DD"}"},"total":555},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608203548381791038","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容非常的搞笑，（除了鱼其它什么都钓得到）的钓鱼佬陈也与公正的刑警张国栋这对欢喜冤家刻画的非常生动。借着系统给的宝藏宝物图，钓到了许许多多不该钓到的东西，而张国栋也是陈也钓到不该钓到东西的时候的第一求助人选。
                          总之，非常值得观看。","text_exts":[{"e":25,"s":22,"text":"钓鱼佬","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%92%93%E9%B1%BC%E4%BD%AC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774128052E5F2D3DD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227608203548381791038%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227578464891799882814%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%92%93%E9%B1%BC%E4%BD%AC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771425941,"group_id":"7578464891799882814","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5KHMfaifaTvY9JJC0v7cjp2g4sn/FfcNb7VoVLuOhC1","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2314922578419292","user_name":"婆罗洲的穆雷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2314922578419292","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578464891799882814","book_info":{"abstract":"【直播+系统+搞笑+刑侦+非正经钓鱼佬】 
陈也绑定“钓鱼热力图系统”，本以为能盘老板、钓巨物，从此走上人生巅峰。 谁知道，这系统它不正经！
 第一竿，野河作钓，反手钓出一具陈年碎尸，荣获“热心市民”锦旗！ 第二竿，深山夜钓，这回没死人，却把走私集团的无人机给拉了下来，喜提五万奖金！ 第三竿，挑战黑坑，一锚下去挂住老板作弊用的“绝户网”，直接把老板送进局子吃牢饭！ 
…… 
随着二战航空炸弹、国宝娃娃鱼、豪门丢失的五千万假牙接连出水…… 全网疯了：“这哥们哪是钓鱼佬啊，这分明是潜伏在民间的刑部尚书！” 刑侦队长张国栋崩溃了：“陈也，算我求你了，今天能不能休息一天？局里的看守所都让你给钓满了！” 陈也看着满屋子的锦旗和奖金，欲哭无泪：“警察叔叔，其实我真的只想喝口鱼汤……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f314a8cc46caaaaef5b1d54555f5cfdd","author":"零六一七","author_id":"","book_id":"7578464891799882814","book_name":"离谱！这钓鱼佬除了鱼，啥都能钓","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7578464985869730366","read_count":"36714","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"876782"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"293","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,直播,钓鱼,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d8ba8eff3f99f6946f1a69c001e6c0e1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312052&x-signature=8VerMheGqm%2F6NZnhzChNZ%2BI1m6s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111112224418","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"35"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322052052544C4C72C3C4E5F2D3DD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4106,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3017},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600402751622677272","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"疑似空军佬的临终幻想（不是）其实我也是空军佬来的，内容很有意思，看到中间寻思后面还能怎么写，万万没想到啊，荒谬里透露着合理，男主爱装逼但是三观没毛病，无cp好评！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769610490,"group_id":"7578464891799882814","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6kruPZpLHCjg1LhRrYD+KY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/15794c2bbc8948b0a65065880a907e85~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708086&x-signature=xf2ghlF%2FOjoI%2FSw2kPHeSgxEw98%3D","user_id":"100419418498","user_name":"二粽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100419418498","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":34,"fan_ranklist_title":"铁杆粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1740244084,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578464891799882814","book_info":{"abstract":"【直播+系统+搞笑+刑侦+非正经钓鱼佬】 
陈也绑定“钓鱼热力图系统”，本以为能盘老板、钓巨物，从此走上人生巅峰。 谁知道，这系统它不正经！
 第一竿，野河作钓，反手钓出一具陈年碎尸，荣获“热心市民”锦旗！ 第二竿，深山夜钓，这回没死人，却把走私集团的无人机给拉了下来，喜提五万奖金！ 第三竿，挑战黑坑，一锚下去挂住老板作弊用的“绝户网”，直接把老板送进局子吃牢饭！ 
…… 
随着二战航空炸弹、国宝娃娃鱼、豪门丢失的五千万假牙接连出水…… 全网疯了：“这哥们哪是钓鱼佬啊，这分明是潜伏在民间的刑部尚书！” 刑侦队长张国栋崩溃了：“陈也，算我求你了，今天能不能休息一天？局里的看守所都让你给钓满了！” 陈也看着满屋子的锦旗和奖金，欲哭无泪：“警察叔叔，其实我真的只想喝口鱼汤……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f314a8cc46caaaaef5b1d54555f5cfdd","author":"零六一七","author_id":"","book_id":"7578464891799882814","book_name":"离谱！这钓鱼佬除了鱼，啥都能钓","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":493,"name":"钓鱼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493&name=钓鱼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7578464985869730366","read_count":"36714","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"876782"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"293","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,直播,钓鱼,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d8ba8eff3f99f6946f1a69c001e6c0e1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312052&x-signature=8VerMheGqm%2F6NZnhzChNZ%2BI1m6s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111112224418","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"290"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322052052544C4C72C3C4E5F2D3DD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读27小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":78,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":92755,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":96932,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11794},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610340828320383806","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看！读这本书，第一感觉就是顺畅——作者的文笔特别好，不玩花哨，却能把每一个场景都写得很鲜活。人物说的话、做事的方式，都让人觉得特别真实，好像他们就生活在我们身边。有些句子写得特别美，但又不会让人觉得做作，就是那种读着读着会停下来再读一遍，心里感叹“写得真好”的感觉。故事也特别抓人。作者很会讲故事，不会一上来就告诉你结局，而是一点点展开，前面的小事后面都会用上，读到最后有种豁然开朗的感觉。节奏也把握得刚刚好，该快的时候快，该慢的时候慢，让你不知不觉就跟着故事走下去了。最打动人的还是里面的人物。作者写人不是简单地写好写坏，而是写出他们的复杂——有缺点，有挣扎，也有善良。读着读着，你会发现某个角色就像你认识的某个人，甚至像你自己。他们的选择、他们的犹豫、他们的成长，都会让你忍不住去理解和共情。总之这是一本读起来很享受的书，无论你是想看个好故事，还是想感受文字的魅力，都不会失望。推荐！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771924641,"group_id":"7578464891799882814","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8lD36Tw6M+fOXw7563eVFWtlK6pncvCyFtfPntMWo0p","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/131e3fb53ac14718be870a978ef15b97~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707642&x-signature=%2B%2BCESL1PGweK6qvpVVjs0wtY%2B1M%3D","user_id":"4302842182245832","user_name":"剜月成碑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4302842182245832","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":29,"fan_ranklist_title":"铁杆粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7578464891799882814","book_info":{"abstract":"【直播+系统+搞笑+刑侦+非正经钓鱼佬】
